sessions_mined.name: Ftse key verification models
sessions_mined.focus: Full-run proof, CI, data sources, research limits

sessions_mined.name: Merge request commit failure
sessions_mined.focus: Models roadmap, research overlay, data gaps

ideas.title: Widen universe first (AIM / Europe / worldwide)
ideas.summary: Learning bottleneck is weekly periods, not name count; worse data/liquidity; no code path
ideas.revisit_when: FTSE 350 decision-review loop is stable and there is a clear data story

ideas.title: Evolutionary / survival-of-the-fittest parallel sims
ideas.summary: Sparse weekly history leads to overfitting; high-churn genomes look fit until costs dominate
ideas.revisit_when: Many tens of weekly snapshots + cost-penalised walk-forward fitness

ideas.title: Rewrite assign_signal() from LLM research
ideas.summary: Research should overlay, not own the primary quant signal
ideas.revisit_when: Explicit product decision to make LLM output part of base signal

ideas.title: More cheapness / P/E-variant screens
ideas.summary: Saturated; adds noise
ideas.revisit_when: Per-model attribution shows a cheapness gap

ideas.title: DCF as a screen model
ideas.summary: yfinance too thin across FTSE
ideas.revisit_when: Better fundamentals (RNS/paid API)

ideas.title: ESG / sentiment as quant models
ideas.summary: Belongs in research unless a dedicated feed exists
ideas.revisit_when: Paid ESG/sentiment source available

ideas.title: Level 2 / ADVFN order book
ideas.summary: Weak fit for weekly batch without licensed depth
ideas.revisit_when: Licensed L2 + trade-plan overlay needed

ideas.title: Resource/reserve miner metrics
ideas.summary: Sector-specific, hard data
ideas.revisit_when: Dedicated resources feed

ideas.title: Extra storage compression / same-day cron micro-tests
ideas.summary: Explicitly skipped after earlier storage/cron work
ideas.revisit_when: Local output/history/ pain returns

ideas.title: Node 20 Actions deprecation nit
ideas.summary: Harmless noise
ideas.revisit_when: Forced by action upgrades

ideas.title: Sync private live holdings into git/CI
ideas.summary: Privacy; dashboard localStorage must stay private
ideas.revisit_when: Private bridge (not git) is designed

ideas.title: Browser-only fully independent automation
ideas.summary: Only runs when dashboard is open
ideas.revisit_when: Server Action/ftse-paper-auto insufficient

ideas.title: Decision-review learning on automated book
ideas.summary: Review automated trades for excess after costs; tune small knobs (max positions, timing strictness, conviction floor, sector cap). Preferred now path vs evolution.
ideas.revisit_when: Implementing self-learning on paper-auto (next build step)

ideas.title: Evolutionary genomes (stage 2)
ideas.summary: Genomes = sim knobs ± weight deltas; fitness = excess − λ×costs; elites + small mutations; freeze screen signals first
ideas.revisit_when: After L1; history thick enough to trust fitness

ideas.title: Wire trade plans into simulator
ideas.summary: Limit/stop plans are advisory; sim still uses conviction/timing
ideas.revisit_when: Want simulated validation of levels

ideas.title: Clarify tactical vs whole-position stops
ideas.summary: Semantics ambiguous if/when sim consumes plans
ideas.revisit_when: L3 starts

ideas.title: Trade-plan magic numbers to config
ideas.summary: Hard-coded thresholds fine until tuning/backtests
ideas.revisit_when: Tuning trade-plan params

ideas.title: Sector-stratified backtest
ideas.summary: Does cheapness work by sector?
ideas.revisit_when: Enough archived runs

ideas.title: Modest liquid UK All-Share slice
ideas.summary: Volume + quality floors; not AIM/world
ideas.revisit_when: FTSE 350 archive + decision-review stable

ideas.title: Official AIC / published NAV for trusts
ideas.summary: Trust track uses book-value NAV proxy
ideas.revisit_when: Discount-to-book too coarse

ideas.title: Yahoo volume/ATR technicals
ideas.summary: Higher signal-per-effort than L2 scrapes
ideas.revisit_when: Refining buy-tier trade plans

ideas.title: Companies House / annual-report PDF ingest
ideas.summary: Next filings step after RNS (memo-only)
ideas.revisit_when: RNS bodies still thin for FINANCIAL REVIEW

ideas.title: UK-primary fundamentals (Refinitiv/FMP/RNS depth)
ideas.summary: Supplement yfinance balance-sheet/dividend gaps
ideas.revisit_when: Data-quality errors dominate signals

ideas.title: Paid news API
ideas.summary: Beyond Google News RSS
ideas.revisit_when: News quality becomes a bottleneck

ideas.title: SQLite / columnar history store
ideas.summary: Deferred after gzip+retention
ideas.revisit_when: Larger universe or local history pain

ideas.title: Research beyond capped buy tier / short-adversarial mode
ideas.summary: Do not auto-research holds/avoids yet
ideas.revisit_when: Capped buy-tier memos prove decision value

ideas.title: Overlay follow-ons
ideas.summary: Extend research to more buy; email on verdict downgrade; sizing from conviction; verdict_override.yaml
ideas.revisit_when: Overlay vs screen-only sim shows benefit

ideas.title: Multi-turn agent + structured JSON
ideas.summary: Deeper RNS cross-check loops
ideas.revisit_when: Cost/runtime budget allows

ideas.title: Model roadmap after risk family
ideas.summary: Shareholder yield, Novy-Marx, mid-cycle P/E, sector-appropriate value, momentum-as-family
ideas.revisit_when: Risk family + adaptive weights validated

ideas.title: Montier C-Score
ideas.summary: Useful negative filter; after Sloan/FCF conversion if adding one EQ model
ideas.revisit_when: After earnings-quality/distress family

ideas.title: Portfolio concentration / sizing UI
ideas.summary: Sector caps, correlation warnings, size hints
ideas.revisit_when: Report should answer what to do with the list

ideas.title: Synced portfolio backend / dedicated hosting
ideas.summary: Leave Pages+Actions until shared state, login, live refresh, or SLA needs
ideas.revisit_when: Multi-device portfolio or private interactive dash

ideas.title: External cron to workflow_dispatch
ideas.summary: In-repo catch-up schedules, same-day skip guards, repository_dispatch, and docs/ops/orchestrator-cron.md + scripts/dispatch_orchestrator.sh shipped. Enable external cron host + GH_PAT once per that doc.
ideas.revisit_when: Only if Sundays still miss after external cron is enabled

ideas.title: Prove Monday GitHub cron
ideas.summary: Confirm 17 7 * * 1 (or Schedule→dispatch wrapper)
ideas.revisit_when: Next Monday after cron window

ideas.title: Parallel fetch + caching
ideas.summary: Sequential yfinance loop
ideas.revisit_when: Weekly runtime becomes painful

ideas.title: CI pytest on PRs
ideas.summary: Hygiene before relying on weekly dashboard
ideas.revisit_when: Before production reliance

ideas.title: Private live-holdings surveillance bridge
ideas.summary: Watchlist/--add-watch is the safe path; true personal live sync needs non-git storage
ideas.revisit_when: Need CI surveillance of personal live book

ideas.title: Rotate any API/SMTP secrets that were pasted or committed
ideas.summary: Git history may still contain old keys even after gitignore fixes
ideas.revisit_when: Immediately if keys may still be live

ideas.title: Re-verify CURSOR_API_KEY in a fresh Cloud Agent
ideas.summary: Secrets may not inject into an already-running pod
ideas.revisit_when: Next new Cloud Agent run

ideas.title: Quote special characters in .env
ideas.summary: Unquoted passwords break source .env
ideas.revisit_when: When recreating or editing .env locally

ideas.title: Incorporate offline libraries into live/paper screen (stage 4)
ideas.summary: When a non-UK market library has PIT constituents, coverage, and data-quality floors comparable to FTSE 350, wire it into paper screening only — not before.
ideas.revisit_when: docs/data/library manifests show high coverage + freshness for a target market and FTSE richness goals are met

ideas.title: Standardise verify-before-trade decision packs (stage 2)
ideas.summary: Harden prompt/decision-pack templates: signal → thesis → levels → size → risks, with low false confidence, suitable for routine manual trading.
ideas.revisit_when: Paper-auto narratives and research memos are stable week-to-week

ideas.title: Multi-currency NAV and FX policy for global paper books
ideas.summary: When screening or holding non-GBP names, define reporting currency, FX source, and whether hedging is assumed in paper NAV.
ideas.revisit_when: First non-UK market enters paper track (stage 4)

ideas.title: Capital at risk / live broker automation (stage 6)
ideas.summary: Do not connect live capital or broker APIs until stages 2–5 are proven in paper with cost-aware review.
ideas.revisit_when: Manual packs trusted, decision-review learning working, and multi-market paper track proven

ideas.title: Offline screen archives for library markets (screen-lite)
ideas.summary: Once a market library has solid fundamentals coverage, run the quant screen offline and archive scores/signals/history under the library — without changing the live FTSE path. Needed for rich stage-4 expansion.
ideas.revisit_when: Target market library coverage/freshness is high and market-aware fetch (non-.L tickers) is solid

ideas.title: Selective budget research on library strong-buy candidates
ideas.summary: After offline screen ranks names, run low-cap research memos on strong_buy/buy candidates using a cheaper Cursor model (--model) since latency is not a priority. Market-aware filings/news required first.
ideas.revisit_when: Offline library screen produces stable buy-tier shortlists for at least one non-UK market

ideas.title: Market-aware fetch for non-UK library tickers
ideas.summary: fetch_company_metrics currently normalises via to_lse_ticker; library markets need Yahoo suffixes preserved (.AX, US bare symbols, EU) or metrics will be wrong/empty.
ideas.revisit_when: Before relying on library metrics for screen-lite or stage 4

ideas.title: Wire live Cursor usage API into library budget ledger
ideas.summary: If Cursor exposes remaining included credits via API, replace estimated spend + manual plan_monthly_usd with live remaining balance for the 10% weekly / surplus-day controls.
ideas.revisit_when: Cursor usage/credits API is available to CURSOR_API_KEY

ideas.title: Signal-priority maintenance refresh for graduated libraries
ideas.summary: Once full weekly refresh is no longer needed, prioritise maintenance (Yahoo metrics/filings cadence) by screen signal / research verdict — e.g. strong_buy and buy first, then hold/alumni — instead of round-robin or uniform caps.
ideas.revisit_when: Library richness is stable and Actions runtime or stale floors suggest throttling maintenance_max_tickers away from full

ideas.title: Full Interactive Investor tradable universe catalog
ideas.summary: Superseded by Trading 212 north star: catalogue via ftse-library t212-catalogue + overlay under docs/data/library/t212_coverage/. Legacy ii_coverage allowlist retained as fallback / historical artifacts.
ideas.revisit_when: Official II instrument export / partner feed available, or when expanding beyond index/liquid slices (full AIM All-Share, broader Asia cash equities).

ideas.title: Gap-fill: ingest — Add Companies House filed-accounts PDF fetch and text extract for UK-lis
ideas.summary: Add Companies House filed-accounts PDF fetch and text extract for UK-listed names when `filings_bodies` count is zero — unlocks pension notes, contingencies, going-concern, and governance sections missing from RNS headlines.
ideas.revisit_when: After next weekly email gap-fill pass confirms the gap persists

ideas.title: Gap-fill: ingest — Re-pull full Investegate/RNS HTML or PDF bodies for indexed items tagged
ideas.summary: Re-pull full Investegate/RNS HTML or PDF bodies for indexed items tagged “FY25 Results”, “interim”, and “annual report” rather than Google News wrapper URLs; current index lists 31 filings with `with_body: 0`.
ideas.revisit_when: After next weekly email gap-fill pass confirms the gap persists

ideas.title: Gap-fill: scoring — Override sector classification for plantation/agricultural issuers (e.g.
ideas.summary: Override sector classification for plantation/agricultural issuers (e.g. map to Agriculture/Commodities) so Consumer Defensive peer-relative scores are not applied to palm-oil producers with demonstrated revenue cyclicality.
ideas.revisit_when: After next weekly email gap-fill pass confirms the gap persists

ideas.title: Gap-fill: ingest — Fetch Hikma IR results presentation and annual-report PDFs from hikma.co
ideas.summary: Fetch Hikma IR results presentation and annual-report PDFs from hikma.com and extract cash-flow bridge tables, segment margins, and dividend-policy text into `filings/bodies/`.
ideas.revisit_when: After next weekly email gap-fill pass confirms the gap persists

ideas.title: Gap-fill: ingest — Re-classify UK RNS items by headline pattern (Full Year Results, Half Ye
ideas.summary: Re-classify UK RNS items by headline pattern (Full Year Results, Half Year, Trading Update) and download PDF bodies from Investegate/LSE direct URLs when Ticker RNS API returns empty text.
ideas.revisit_when: After next weekly email gap-fill pass confirms the gap persists

ideas.title: Gap-fill: scoring — Add healthcare overlay flag when trailing FCF is negative AND Piotroski
ideas.summary: Add healthcare overlay flag when trailing FCF is negative AND Piotroski F-Score ≤ 4 — cap adjusted signal at neutral/caution despite composite Strong Buy.
ideas.revisit_when: After next weekly email gap-fill pass confirms the gap persists

ideas.title: Gap-fill: ingest — Download and text-extract PDF bodies from `ticker_rns_api` URLs in `fili
ideas.summary: Download and text-extract PDF bodies from `ticker_rns_api` URLs in `filings_index.json` (currently 52 indexed, 0 bodies); filter mis-attributed Google News headlines by company name/ticker before indexing.
ideas.revisit_when: After next weekly email gap-fill pass confirms the gap persists

ideas.title: Gap-fill: ingest — Populate `operating_cashflow` in `CompanyMetrics` from Yahoo cash-flow s
ideas.summary: Populate `operating_cashflow` in `CompanyMetrics` from Yahoo cash-flow statements — MEGP.L shows OCF £90.8m in `financials_annual.json` but `None` in fetch, causing false Piotroski/Earnings Quality failures.
ideas.revisit_when: After next weekly email gap-fill pass confirms the gap persists

ideas.title: Gap-fill: ingest — Fetch company IR results presentation PDF from `photo-me.co.uk` investor
ideas.summary: Fetch company IR results presentation PDF from `photo-me.co.uk` investor pages (listed in `gap_fill_source_map.json` → `company_ir_presentation`) for segment tables, dividend policy, and H1 cash-flow bridges missing from Yahoo.
ideas.revisit_when: After next weekly email gap-fill pass confirms the gap persists

ideas.title: Trailing stop with entry-floor hard floor in technical sim
ideas.summary: Optional sim track: trail stops up from refreshed technicals but never below original entry stop; keep static-plan track for comparison.
ideas.revisit_when: Implemented — Performance submenu + static/trailing tracks

ideas.title: Prefer Trading 212 over Interactive Investor for execution
ideas.summary: Done: PROJECT_OBJECTIVE + t212_coverage north star; T212 preferred over ii for UK ISA + API automation. Live orders still deferred (N14).
ideas.revisit_when: Approaching live/paper broker integration (stage 6), or when refreshing broker preference

ideas.title: Trading 212 instrument catalog as tradability overlay
ideas.summary: Done: t212_client + t212-catalogue/t212-overlay CLI; ISIN/shortName index; dashboard/decision-pack fields dual-written (tradable_on_t212 + legacy aliases).
ideas.revisit_when: Refreshing catalogue join quality or expanding ISIN coverage in library constituents

ideas.title: Live Trading 212 API integration
ideas.summary: Do not wire live order placement yet. T212 API is beta (non-idempotent orders); project is still at stage 2 manual packs. Prefer demo/paper path first when broker work starts.
ideas.revisit_when: Stages 2–5 exit criteria met and human override workflow defined (see N13)

ideas.title: T212 venue-gap ladder: ATX, PSI20, SMI, OMXS30, ISEQ20
ideas.summary: Done: registered atx/psi20/smi/omxs30/iseq20 in MARKET_REGISTRY + DEFAULT_MARKET_QUEUE; constituents refreshed. Confirm T212 catalogue hit rates via t212-align when credentials exist.
ideas.revisit_when: ftse-library t212-catalogue succeeds and t212-align shows stock counts on VI/LS/SW/ST/IR exchange hints

ideas.title: Expand ladder before T212 catalogue verification
ideas.summary: Do not grow new offline markets from allowlist assumptions alone; hang_seng/sti/asx200 look 100% on suffix heuristics but need catalogue hit rates before further APAC breadth.
ideas.revisit_when: Catalogue fetched and alignment_report.json shows per-market catalogue_hit_pct

ideas.title: Improve Yahoo↔T212 mapping for weak catalogue markets
ideas.summary: After live catalogue fetch, hang_seng/sti show 0% catalogue hits and several EU/AU markets are well below 70% while allowlist still marks them tradable. Tighten ISIN/shortName mapping or trim via unavailable_watch.
ideas.revisit_when: Next t212-align after catalogue refresh, or when researching those markets for paper/live trading

ideas.title: Default TRADING212_ENV to live or document key/env pairing
ideas.summary: Injected API credentials return 401 on demo.trading212.com but succeed on live. Default env is demo, so bare ftse-library t212-catalogue fails until --env live is passed.
ideas.revisit_when: Next credentials rotation or when someone hits catalogue 401 again

ideas.title: Separate Cursor subscription vs on-demand usage ceilings in policy
ideas.summary: Implemented: allocation_basis=usage_weekly_gbp (£30/week × gbp_usd_rate), enforce_weekly_research_cap, and constraining/near_limit budget flags. Subscription plan_monthly_usd remains metadata.
ideas.revisit_when: n/a — done in weekly usage budget PR

ideas.title: Unify live FTSE research spend into library weekly ledger
ideas.summary: Live ftse-research / email --research-docs use count caps and never call record_estimated_spend. Fold that Cursor usage into the same weekly GBP envelope so library + live research cannot double-spend the allocation.
ideas.revisit_when: After a few weeks of enforce_weekly_research_cap with the £30 usage envelope

ideas.title: Recalibrate estimated_memo_usd from real Cursor bills
ideas.summary: Library spend ledger uses a flat --.40/memo estimate. After constrained weeks, compare estimated_spend vs Cursor usage page and retune estimated_memo_usd.
ideas.revisit_when: 2–4 weeks of enforce_weekly_research_cap=true with known memo counts

ideas.title: Do not chase live Cursor usage API before envelope calibration
ideas.summary: Live usage API (L32) is blocked on Cursor exposing credits to CURSOR_API_KEY. Prefer running the £30/week estimated gate for a few cycles and recalibrating estimated_memo_usd (L52) before investing in billing integration.
ideas.revisit_when: Cursor documents a usage/credits API for CURSOR_API_KEY, or estimated vs billed spend diverges badly after 2–4 constrained weeks

ideas.title: Do not expand live screen beyond FTSE 350 yet
ideas.summary: Library breadth is far ahead (16 graduated markets). Stage 4 live expansion should wait until stage-2 decision packs are routinely trusted and decision-review has enough marks to adjust knobs.
ideas.revisit_when: Stage 2 exit criteria met and decision-review has actionable excess-return history

ideas.title: AI judgment paper track (packs at decision time)
ideas.summary: Implemented as primary learning track: ai_judgment book uses adjusted_signal + research_verdict=accumulate; success judged by excess after costs vs ^FTSE with rules control. See docs/ops/primary-learning-track.md.
ideas.revisit_when: Primary track has thick marks and excess vs market/control is measurable for several weeks

ideas.title: Do not let AI judgment own live capital path yet
ideas.summary: Primary learning track is paper-only. Keep live broker automation and any promotion of AI gates to real capital off until the AI-judgment book shows persistent excess vs ^FTSE and vs the rules control in walk-forward review.
ideas.revisit_when: AI judgment paper track shows persistent excess vs screen-only and FTSE in walk-forward review

ideas.title: Companies House PDF ingest for UK gap-fill
ideas.summary: After PDF/RNS body refetch, next fetch weakness is statutory accounts via Companies House free API (ticker→company number map). Unlocks pensions, covenants, going-concern language when RNS bodies remain thin.
ideas.revisit_when: Gap-fill fetch_attempts show RNS/PDF bodies present but questions still unresolved for UK names

ideas.title: Do not backdate research revisions for past paper decisions
ideas.summary: Extending source lookbacks and re-running memos is fine going forward, but inventing historical revisions as-of past run dates would leak post-period knowledge into AI-judgment / historical_analysis PIT overlays.
ideas.revisit_when: Never as a learning shortcut; only reconsider if building a separate counterfactual research lab outside the live paper track

ideas.title: Extend FILINGS_LOOKBACK beyond 800d after CH bodies exist
ideas.summary: Raising FILINGS_LOOKBACK_DAYS / FINANCIAL_YEARS alone does little while UK bodies stay empty (Google wrappers). Once Companies House accounts are ingested, revisit deeper lookback and FILINGS_MAX_ITEMS prioritisation for multi-year statutory history.
ideas.revisit_when: CH accounts ingest ships and gap-fill with_body rises for UK memos

ideas.title: Generic IR PDF crawler (beyond per-issuer L38/L43)
ideas.summary: Prefer a small allowlisted IR-page PDF discovery helper over Hikma/Photo-Me hardcodes. Needs IR homepage map or search-derived PDF URLs; more fragile than Companies House.
ideas.revisit_when: CH ingest live and still missing FCF bridges / segment tables that only live in IR decks

ideas.title: Seed IR allowlist URLs for active memo tickers
ideas.summary: Manual docs/data/research_ir_urls.json MVP is wired; populate URLs for paper-auto / gap-fill UK names that still miss FCF bridges and segment tables after Companies House accounts.
ideas.revisit_when: First deepen-sources or gap-fill run with COMPANIES_HOUSE_API_KEY shows CH bodies present but IR-only tables still missing

ideas.title: Companies House Streaming API for realtime filings
ideas.summary: Streaming API pushes company/filing changes over long-lived connections; our research path only needs on-demand REST GET for search, filing-history, and document download. Keys are not interchangeable with REST.
ideas.revisit_when: Need near-realtime UK filing alerts outside weekly research cycles

ideas.title: OCR for image-only Companies House accounts PDFs
ideas.summary: Shell plc and some other large issuers file image-only group accounts to Companies House; pypdf extracts no text. OCR (or preferring ESEF/iXBRL/SEC 20-F) would unlock CH body depth for those names.
ideas.revisit_when: After IR allowlist + SEC dual-list fallbacks still leave CH bodies empty for multiple memo tickers

ideas.title: Auto-pull SEC 20-F for dual-listed UK memo tickers
ideas.summary: UK deepen currently stays on RNS/CH; dual-listed names like SHEL.L have text-rich SEC 20-F HTML. A regime helper could auto-add recent 20-F/6-K URLs without manual IR allowlist seeding.
ideas.revisit_when: More than a handful of FTSE memos need SEC 20-F bodies because CH PDFs are image-only

ideas.title: Upgrade Ticker RNS plan for symbol-filtered disclosures
ideas.summary: Current TICKER_API_KEY plan ignores symbol/isin filters and returns a global Form 8.x feed. Client-side issuer headline filter now drops noise, but a paid symbol filter would restore direct RNS bodies for memo tickers.
ideas.revisit_when: Ticker.app plan is upgraded or an alternate UK RNS API with issuer filter is available

ideas.title: Seed AEP.L IR allowlist once Anglo Eastern PDFs are discoverable
ideas.summary: AEP Plantations CH accounts remain image-only and angloeastern.co.uk investor pages are JS SPA without direct PDF hrefs. Seed research_ir_urls.json when annual/interim PDF URLs are stable.
ideas.revisit_when: Anglo Eastern publishes stable direct annual-report PDF URLs or ESEF/iXBRL text is available

ideas.title: Re-run AEP/HIK/MEGP agent gap-fill after CURSOR_API_KEY refresh
ideas.summary: New shell bc-f3c1c12e still fails ftse-verify-key with Invalid User API Key (CURSOR_API_KEY present, len=69, crsr_…). Deepen confirmed HIK with_body=3, MEGP=4, AEP=0. Gap-fill targets selected but Agent.create failed for all three. Create a fresh User API key at cursor.com/dashboard/integrations, replace the cloud secret, then launch another new agent run.
ideas.revisit_when: Fresh CURSOR_API_KEY from Integrations verifies via ftse-verify-key in a new shell

ideas.title: Preflight CURSOR_API_KEY against /v0/me before gap-fill agents
ideas.summary: Presence of CURSOR_API_KEY in cloud secrets is not enough: both prior and this new shell had a set crsr_ key that API rejects. Gate agent gap-fill launches on ftse-verify-key success.
ideas.revisit_when: After a valid User API key is installed and N21 gap-fill succeeds once

ideas.title: Refresh CURSOR_API_KEY after bc-53006131 verify failure
ideas.summary: ftse-verify-key in shell bc-53006131 failed with Invalid User API Key. CURSOR_API_KEY is present (len=69, crsr_…). Create a fresh User API key at cursor.com/dashboard/integrations, replace the cloud secret, then re-run ftse-verify-key in a new shell before deep analysis / gap-fill agents.
ideas.revisit_when: Fresh CURSOR_API_KEY from Integrations verifies via ftse-verify-key in a new shell

ideas.title: Confirm CURSOR_API_KEY is User API Key not Admin key
ideas.summary: api.cursor.com returns Invalid User API Key for the injected secret (format crsr_+64hex is fine; same 401 as a fake key). Likely causes: revoked/rotated secret, or an Admin/team API key pasted instead of a User API Key from Integrations. Recreate from cursor.com/dashboard/integrations (User API Keys), update the cloud secret, re-verify.
ideas.revisit_when: After replacing CURSOR_API_KEY and ftse-verify-key succeeds

ideas.title: Cursor docs still point Cloud Agents keys at Dashboard API Keys
ideas.summary: Official API docs say Cloud Agents keys come from Dashboard → API Keys, but that page only creates Admin (admin:*) keys. User API Keys live at dashboard/integrations (moved from Cloud Agents). Our verify-key/README now document Integrations; revisit if Cursor unifies the UI.
ideas.revisit_when: Cursor updates docs/UI so User API Keys are obvious from API Keys page

ideas.title: User API Keys section missing from Integrations for some accounts
ideas.summary: Owner sees only Source Control + Integrations on dashboard/integrations — no User API Keys generator. Alternatives: Cloud Agents → My Settings → API Keys, or ask Cursor support if UI is plan/account gated. Do not use admin:* keys from /dashboard/api-keys for CURSOR_API_KEY.
ideas.revisit_when: Owner locates User API Keys UI or Cursor confirms where personal keys live

ideas.title: Create CURSOR_API_KEY from desktop browser not iPad web
ideas.summary: Owner uses Cursor web on iPad; Integrations and Cloud Agents My Settings show no User API Keys generator (iPad Safari is known to clip/hide dashboard sections). Use a desktop browser or Request Desktop Website, then create the User API Key and update the cloud secret.
ideas.revisit_when: Owner can access User API Keys UI from a desktop browser
